Description.description: Tracks data origin for audit trail across all system tables
Date and time when record was soft-deleted
Date when this version becomes active
Value of the Effective Labor Rate in base currency.
Date when this version expires (next version takes over)
Indicates if this is the currently active version
Indicates if record is soft-deleted (prevents permanent loss)
Last successful sync with external system
Additional context, special rate justifications, etc.
Value of the Offsite Labor Rate in base currency.
Total offsite labor costs (office PM, report writing, misc office work)
Value of the Offsite Labor Total in base currency.
Value of the Onsite Labor Rate in base currency.
Total onsite labor costs (daily commute, mobilization, onsite work, LOTO, misc, PM)
Value of the Onsite Labor Total in base currency.
Value of the Outside Services Rate in base currency.
Total outside services costs (test equipment, generator, lab, subcontractors, misc)
Value of the Outside Services Total in base currency.
Total estimated revenue for entire scope (informational/verification)
Value of the Scope Total Value in base currency.
Unique identifier for entity instances
Scope-specific multiplier for markup or typical build quantities
External system synchronization status
Total estimated hours across all apparatus in this scope
Value of the Travel Rate in base currency.
Total travel costs (flights, car rental, hotel, per diem, travel time)
Value of the Travel Total in base currency.
Version number for rate changes (1, 2, 3...)
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Exchange rate for the currency associated with the entity with respect to the base currency.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Unique identifier for the organization
Date and time that the record was migrated.
Status of the Scope Labor Detail
Status of the Scope Labor Detail
Reason for the status of the Scope Labor Detail
Reason for the status of the Scope Labor Detail
For internal use only.
Unique identifier of the currency associated with the entity.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
